name: Jiangshi
summary: Reveal the Moon Shrine, forge the Coin Sword, then dispossess it with 9+ Purple strength.
objective: The Jiangshi is a restless corpse seeking to feed on the energy of the living. Stop the Jiangshi by crafting a mystic blade powered by ancient rituals under moonlight.

powers.name: Drain Vital Energy
powers.description: After dealing all damage, place the Jiangshi in the location of the player taking the next turn.

steps.title: Construct the Coin Sword
steps.description: Reveal the Moon Shrine. At that location, either discard an item and fit a same-color Coin Sword token (value at or below the item's strength) into the 18-space sword pattern, or remove an already-placed token.

steps.title: Dispossessed
steps.description: In the Jiangshi's location, discard Purple Item 9+ and use the Coin sword to defeat it.
